CREATE TABLE test_data (id Int32, value String);
SELECT * FROM test_data WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM exclude_data);
CREATE TABLE supplementary_data (group_id Int32, name String);
SELECT name FROM supplementary_data WHERE group_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM exclude_data);
SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM exclude_data UNION SELECT id FROM supplementary_data);
SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE (id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM exclude_data)) AND (value NOT IN ('B', 'D'));
SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_data WHERE NOT (id IN (1, 2) AND value IN ('A', 'B'));
CREATE TABLE complex_data (key Int32, item String);
SELECT item FROM complex_data WHERE key NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE value = 'C');
